content.method: Administrative data linkage across maintainer type, admissions records, and school-level SES/ethnic composition statistics; descriptive and decomposition analysis (e.g., segregation index decomposition by maintainer category).
content.question: What proportion of students in selective gimnáziums, and their disadvantaged/Roma composition, currently sit outside standard Klebelsberg Centre admissions authority due to church, minority self-government, or private maintainer exemptions, and how much of measured segregation is concentrated in this exempt sector versus the standard public sector?
content.why_it_matters: Directly determines the achievable system coverage ceiling for T2, T3, and T5, all of which operate within or depend on standard admissions authority and would leave exempt schools untouched.
